SRx2.about: Takes x1 patch as input and predicts SRx2 patch

SRx4.about: Takes SRx2 predicted patch as input and predicts SRx4 patch

SRx8.about: Takes SRx4 predicted patch as input and predicts SRx8 patch

mods_to_use.about: mod_dir values are directory names within sr_midas/models/cnnsr/pretrained/

spot_find_args.about: parameters for finding diffraction spots in a frame

min_d.about: minimum distance (in pixels) between separate peaks in a patch

thresh_rel.about: threshold relative to max intensity within a patch for a peak to be considered

gauss_filter_sigma.about: sigma of the gaussian filter applied before peak fitting

median_filter_size.about: size of the median filter applied before peak fitting

peak_crop_size.about: size of the peak patch extracted around each position for fitting

pvfit_int_thresh.about: intensity threshold used for pseudo-Voigt fitting

SRx2.about: sub-pixel shift corrections in Y and Z for SRx2 peak positions

SRx4.about: sub-pixel shift corrections in Y and Z for SRx4 peak positions

SRx8.about: sub-pixel shift corrections in Y and Z for SRx8 peak positions
